comment: Flight search rules. The report enumerates every depart×return combo within max_nights and shows the cheapest. Prices themselves live in flights-latest.json (updated on demand / by an API script) so automated weather runs never overwrite them.

route.note: Michel only — Dan is local in Belfast. BFS = Intl (Ryanair/easyJet/Jet2), BHD = City (Aer Lingus/easyJet).

data_source: Manual / on-demand. No reliable free flight-price API; Claude fills flights-latest.json on a session. To automate, plug a free-tier API (Amadeus self-service or Travelpayouts) and write flights-latest.json from it.
